productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Pink Daisy and Squirrel Kidswear
description: CompositionPink round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with flair cap sleeves, and Daisy Duck and squirrel graphic on the front Wash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis pink Daisy duck tee from disney is perfect for your little princess. Daisy and her squirrel friend will keep your little girl company while she romps around in the park or runs around with her friends. The cotton tee with the cap sleeves will keep your little one dry and comfortable. This top looks great when teamed up with denim shorts or skirts for an enjoyable outing. Add on a pair of pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
